span.p: No

span.p: No

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Yes

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Input
Context Text + Generation Type
(Instruction / Response / Text)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center; width: 320px;

span.p:
Initial Population Seeding
LLM called N times with same prompt
(stochastic temperature produces diverse candidates)
Population: Candidate 1, Candidate 2, ..., Candidate N

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Generational Loop
Repeat for G generations

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
1. Mutation
Each candidate has probability p
of being rewritten by LLM
with mutation prompt

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
2. Complexity Measurement
LLM scores each candidate on 1 to 5 scale
(language difficulty, concept density)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
3. Quality Filtering - Strict
LLM evaluates batches of candidates
Binary pass/fail per candidate
(conciseness, clarity, context-alignment)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
All candidates
filtered out?

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
4. Relative Ranking
LLM compares all survivors side-by-side
Assigns ordinal ranks based on: quality,
relevance, factual accuracy, prompt adherence,
inverse bias, inverse toxicity

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
3b. Relaxed Filtering
Keep all candidates
regardless of verdict

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p: Still empty?

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
3c. Fallback
Reuse previous
generation's population

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
5. Complexity-Adjusted Ranking
d = |complexity - target|
r_adj = rank + d
Sort ascending by r_adj

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Elite: Row 0 with best r_adj
always survives

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Stratified Sampling:
Divide remaining into N-1 equal groups
Random pick from each group

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Last generation
reached?

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Final Ranking Pass
Same ranking + complexity adjustment
on last surviving population
(no mutation or filtering)

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 320px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Output
Row 0 = Best Evolved Text
(lowest r_adj)
